infoPlist.NSLocationWhenInUseUsageDescription: HERE needs your location to show you what people are saying nearby and to verify you're present when posting.
infoPlist.NSLocationAlwaysAndWhenInUseUsageDescrip: HERE needs your location to show you what people are saying nearby and to verify you're present when posting.
infoPlist.NSCameraUsageDescription: HERE requires camera access to take photos and videos for posts. No uploads from your camera roll — presence requires you capture it here.
infoPlist.NSMicrophoneUsageDescription: HERE needs microphone access to record audio notes and video with sound.
infoPlist.NSPhotoLibraryUsageDescription: HERE does not access your photo library. All media is captured in-app.

plugins.locationWhenInUsePermission: HERE needs your location to show you what people are saying nearby.

plugins.cameraPermission: HERE requires camera access to capture photos and videos for posts.

plugins.microphonePermission: HERE needs microphone access to record audio notes.
